ast.target: 侧边栏中显示的最大结果数。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: error
ast.target: 用户取消了 MCP 工具执行。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Google Search is not supported by the current provider.
ast.target: 当前提供商不支持 Google 搜索。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Access to local network, private IP addresses, or restricted protocols is forbidden for security reasons. You can enable 'Local Network Access' in Advanced Settings if this is intended.
ast.target: 出于安全原因，禁止访问本地网络、私有 IP 地址或受限协议。如果这是预期行为，您可以在高级设置中启用“本地网络访问”。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Code execution is not supported by the current provider.
ast.target: 当前提供商不支持代码执行。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Agent write access is disabled. The user must enable 'Write' in the chat view or globally in plugin settings.
ast.target: 代理写入访问已禁用。用户必须在聊天视图中或在插件设置中全局启用“写入”。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Permission Denied: Agent is not allowed to perform write or move operations involving excluded paths.
ast.target: 权限被拒绝：不允许代理执行涉及排除路径的写入或移动操作。

ast.name: error
ast.source: CRITICAL SYSTEM ERROR: You did not provide any text in the 'content' argument! Do NOT generate the file text in your conversation output! You MUST place the final text inside the 'content' parameter of this tool call. Please call the tool again correctly.
ast.target: 严重系统错误：您未在 'content' 参数中提供任何文本！请勿在对话输出中生成文件文本！您必须将最终文本放在此工具调用的 'content' 参数中。请正确再次调用该工具。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MCP Client Manager is not available.
ast.target: MCP 客户端管理器不可用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: serverId and uri arguments are required.
ast.target: serverId 和 uri 参数是必需的。

ast.name: label
ast.target: 网络地址的 Base64 字符串

ast.name: label
ast.target: 均衡 (欧洲语言 E5 Small) - 384维 [~30MB]

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的 Base64 字符串

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values

ast.name: name
ast.source: Gardener: organize vault concepts (new files only)
ast.target: 园丁：整理保险库概念（仅限新文件）

ast.name: text
ast.source: View the Ollama guide to troubleshoot
ast.target: 查看 Ollama 指南以进行故障排除

ast.name: text
ast.source: [Tool execution was cancelled by the user]

ast.name: text
ast.target: 诊断工具和日志详细程度。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Warning: This makes you vulnerable to SSRF (Server-Side Request Forgery) and DNS Rebinding attacks. Malicious external websites could resolve to local IP addresses and bypass standard URL checks if the agent reads malicious notes or prompt injections. Use with caution.
ast.target: 警告：这会使您容易受到 SSRF（服务器端请求伪造）和 DNS 重绑定攻击。如果代理读取恶意笔记或提示注入，恶意外部网站可能会解析为本地 IP 地址并绕过标准 URL 检查。请谨慎使用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Hide specific models from dropdown menus to reduce clutter.
ast.target: 从下拉菜单中隐藏特定模型以减少杂乱。

ast.name: text
ast.source: To use a new key, click "Link" to select or create a secret. Credentials are stored securely and not synced.
ast.target: 要使用新密钥，请单击“链接”以选择或创建密钥。凭据安全存储且不会同步。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure how the explorer finds connections and similar notes in your vault.
ast.target: 配置探索者如何在您的保险库中查找连接和相似笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 本体：匹配现有本体笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Changing this triggers a full vault re-scan on exit.
ast.target: 更改此设置将在退出时触发一次完整的保险库重新扫描。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Connect external model context protocol (MCP) servers to allow AI models to perform external actions, such as fetching weather, reading databases, or integrating with other tools.
ast.target: 连接外部模型上下文协议（MCP）服务器，以允许AI模型执行外部操作，例如获取天气、读取数据库或与其他工具集成。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Personalise your research assistant’s intelligence and capabilities.
ast.target: 个性化您的研究助手的智能和能力。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Analyzing vault. This may take a few seconds.
ast.target: 正在分析保险库。这可能需要几秒钟。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will move all links to the target topic and permanently delete the source file!
ast.target: 这将把所有链接移动到目标主题，并永久删除源文件！

ast.name: text
ast.source: The agent wants to perform the following action:
ast.target: 代理希望执行以下操作：

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will completely overwrite the existing note content.
ast.target: 这将完全覆盖现有笔记内容。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 笔记内容或更新（请仔细检查）

ast.name: text
ast.source: I'm sorry, I reached the step limit before finding a definitive answer. Please try rephrasing or check your settings.
ast.target: \n\n抱歉，我在找到明确答案之前达到了步骤限制。请尝试重新措辞或检查您的设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open a note to see similar connections.
ast.target: 打开一个笔记以查看相似连接。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Adjust how strongly similar notes pull together
ast.target: 调整相似笔记相互吸引的强度
